nodes.name: 冠鴞
nodes.summary: 冠鴞（Crested owl，学名 Lophostrix cristata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联20个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The crested owl is found in Central America and northern South America, where it occurs in Belize, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Costa Rica, Ecuador, El Salvador, French Guiana, Guatemala, Guyana, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Panama, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Amazon Basin except in the north-west basin region with western Guyana, Venezuela, and central-eastern Colombia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They favor old growth, however they will also occur in undisturbed secondary growth forest. More specifically, they are most abundant in old floodplain forest and are least abundant in primary seasonally flooded swamp forest. In Mexico, they are found in tropical evergreen and semi-deciduous forests, riparian areas, clearings and foothills

links.label: 保护等级
links.evidence: status = LC

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is suspected to lose 18-21% of suitable habitat within its range over the next 17 years, thus suspected to decline by 25% over three generations. This owl is still fairly common in undisturbed primary forests of the amazon, but could become locally endangered where deforestation takes place
